sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 11:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 11:1
items.html: It is something that decides and connects two far ends. From this you can understand the meaning of the names “middle line” and “middle pillar” in every place, which consist of three Sefirot – Daat, Tifferet, Yesod. (Part 3, Chapter 5, item 4)
